name: Calm Android

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Optional. Set this Codespaces secret if you want Codex CLI to authenticate with an API key instead of interactive ChatGPT sign-in.

postCreateCommand: sudo chown -R vscode:vscode /home/vscode/.gradle && tr -d '\015' < ./gradlew > /tmp/gradlew && cat /tmp/gradlew > ./gradlew && chmod +x ./gradlew && bash ./gradlew --version
